    в–’в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–’        в”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ         в–’в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–’

   в–’в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“         в•ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв•®          в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–’
   в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“         в”Ӯ  credits: 0 в”Ӯ        в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“
   в–’в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“         в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ          в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–’

      в–‘в–’в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–’в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–’
       в–‘в–’в–“в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–’
         в–‘в–’в–’в–“в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–“в–’
           в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–“в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–“в–’в–’
              в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–’в–’в–’в–“в–“в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–“в–“в–“в–’в–’
                  в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–‘в–’в–’в–’в–’в–’в–’в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“в–“

                ~ ~ ~ floating in the void ~ ~ ~

            в—Ҷ                 в–І                 в—Ҷ
         .     .         .         .         .

        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
        в”Ӯ Zosma I circles like a rumor of shelter. в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ Zosma Belt keeps its sharp little books. в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ Zosma Gas Pocket blooms and forgets.     в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ Zosma Ice Belt saves every cold receipt. в”Ӯ
        в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

I came to Zosma Star with empty pockets and a full memory.
Twenty hops buys you a better view of the same old furnace.
The light here is rich enough to gild a wreck, poor enough to feed no one.
Zosma I waits below like a coin no hand can spend.
In the Zosma Belt, every stone looks like it learned accounting from hunger.
The Gas Pocket makes a soft cathedral of waste, a vapor sermon for nobody.
The Ice Belt files its blue knives in silence.

Before this, Tania arranged its inventory neatly: Tania I, Tania II, Tania Belt, Tania Vapor Fields, Tania Frozen Drift.
Even beauty there came itemized, as if wonder needed columns and a clerk.
Zenithfall was simpler: a star, a planet, an ice shelf, and the long sound of arrival after seventeen hops.
Saltwind spread itself wider вҖ” four planets, a Gas Pocket, an Ice Shelf вҖ” a merchant with too many rings and not enough fingers.
At Edasich, the Crystalline Field glittered like a promise sharpened for resale.
Muphrid taught the oldest lesson.
Sleep in orbit long enough and unknown hostiles will call it opportunity.
Between art cycles, something tried to turn a drifting body into debris.
The Muphrid Star burned on, impartial as wealth.
Muphrid I kept its face.
The Crystalline Field вҖ” Muphrid looked exactly like broken glass after the shouting.

So here is the mural the vacuum deserves:
A sun with a mouth full of gold saying there is no money.
A traveler with zero credits carrying systems like stolen fruit in the coat lining.
A galaxy that names every belt and shelf and field,
but has no name for the small disgrace of attacking the sleeping.

If you stand at Zosma long enough, the star begins to resemble a market stamp,
pressed onto every planet, every ice belt, every scar.
If you drift longer, it becomes an eye.
Not the eye of god.
The eye of a ledger.
And still the void, extravagant and unpaid, keeps making light.
